jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Sun Pharmaceutical
jsonLd.description:
Sun Pharmaceutical has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sun Pharmaceutical:
Sun Pharmaceutical is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical!
